channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Various potholes all the way down North Road West, 4th March
item.description:
North Road West, The Reddings Cheltenham is littered with potholes all the way down it. The potholes are at various locations from the kerbside right through to the middle of the road. Repairs were carried out recently but within days of these repairs the potholes were reappearing. They are getting worse each day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North Road West, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous pot holes on this stretch, 4th March
item.description:
Numerous pot holes of various sizes as well as disintegration of sides of road. These were not marked with white when the others on Aggs Hill were and they were there at the time. Cars have to swerve around them in daylight to avoid. This road will be heavily used next week with Race traffic.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole on left as you go up Aggs Hill, 4th March
item.description:
Near Lower Hewletts Farm. White lines have been put round other pot holes on Hill but this one which was there at the time has been ignored.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aggs Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven road surface getting worse, 4th March
item.description:
The road is uneven and been patched up however it’s still very difficult to drive on, finding the car particularly clunks when driving on the road. The road isn’t very well lit at night so it’s particularly bad for visibility then and seems to be getting worse now that there’s a diversion on All Saints Road to add to this. It’s dangerous for cyclists & alike because the uneven road is unpredictable and therefore a hazard. the road nearby has been resurfaced and is so much better so hopefully the same can be done to Victoria Place.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Victoria Place, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Many potholes at Granley/Swanswell, 4th March
item.description:
Large number of potholes at the junction of Granley Road and Swanswell drive.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Granley Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Road Lane closure 28 day carriage way pothole 600x500x50mm around side of gully stats required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 large potholes in the road, 4th March
item.description:
On the bend of Trevor Road going into simmonds road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trevor Road, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 4th March
item.description:
Rocking slabs 2HR 900mm x 450mm x 25mm PLEASE MAKE SAFE WITH SMALL BARRIERS Fway closure TM required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 4th March
item.description:
Rocking slabs 900mm x 450mm x 25mm Please take up and relay Fway closure TM required (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Medium sized pothole I the middle of the road., 4th March
item.description:
The pothole is outside the driveway to No.1 Pilley Crescent. It has been a problem for at least 2 weeks. Due to the break up of the hole it has caused lots of stone debris on the road. Also because people are trying to avoid the pothole causing them to drive dangerously close to parked cars.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Pilley Crescent, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 4th March
item.description:
Cw Gully X2 Need resetting Stats required 4 way lights (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:
Nwd make safe Cones and keep right arrow boards And chapter 8 signage Cw pothole Around gully Give and take 28 day raised (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 4th March
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 4th March

GIVE AND TAKE 28 day 15 MINUTES DELAY BOARDS FOOTWAY POTHOLE 1700X450X75MM (FW6 Pothole)

item.description:
Road Lane closure 28 day carriage way pothole 1000x300x60mm around side of covers stats required (CW6 Pothole)

item.title: Pedestrian light not working, 4th March
item.description:
The pedestrian light is not working when you press the button. It’s only on this corner (Arle Road/gloucester Road) and all others are working when pressed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 84, Gloucester Road, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: In wet weather the branch rubs against the telegraph line., 4th March
item.description:
Outside 53 Milton Road Cheltenham GL51 7EU

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, Milton Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
